metadata.description: Azure region for all resources.
Deployment environment name used for tagging and naming (e.g. prod, staging).
Name of the App Service Plan.
Name of the API app.
Name of the MCP server app.
Name of the Azure Functions app (puzzle-pool background jobs).
Name of the Flex Consumption plan that hosts the Azure Functions app.
App Service Plan SKU.
Name of the Storage Account (3–24 lowercase alphanumeric).
Name of the Cosmos DB account.
Enable the Cosmos DB free tier. Only one account per subscription may use this.
Name of the Key Vault.
Name of the App Configuration store.
Name of the Static Web App.
Custom domain name to bind to the SWA production environment (e.g. sudoku-beta.xenobiasoft.com).
Whether to bind a custom domain to the SWA production environment. Requires DNS to be configured first.
Name of the Log Analytics workspace.
Name of the Application Insights component.
Name of the Application Insights Smart Detection action group.
Name of the failure anomalies smart detector alert rule.

properties.description: Failure Anomalies notifies you of an unusual rise in the rate of failed HTTP requests or dependency calls.

metadata.description: Enable the Cosmos DB free tier. Only one account per subscription may use this. Set to false if another account in the subscription already uses it.
Log Analytics workspace ARM resource ID (for the role assignment scope).
Log Analytics workspace GUID (customerId) — passed to the app as AppInsights__WorkspaceId.
Name of the Flex Consumption plan to create for the Function App.
Name of the existing storage account reused for the Functions runtime, deployment package and puzzle blobs.
Name of the existing Key Vault (for the Key Vault Secrets User role assignment).
Name of the existing Cosmos DB account (for the SQL data-plane role assignment).
Memory allocated per Flex Consumption instance, in MB. 2048 or 4096.
Maximum number of instances the app may scale out to (40–1000).
Custom domain name to bind to the SWA production environment (e.g. sudoku-beta.xenobiasoft.com).
Whether to bind a custom domain to the SWA. Requires DNS to be configured first.
Resource ID of the API App Service to link as a backend. SWA will proxy /api/* requests to it.
Name of the API App Service. Used to reset Easy Auth after SWA linking re-enables it.
